## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX's AI-assisted content creation services and potential collaboration with Onward.](https://fathom.video/share/ZFNALZ5Lc61sz6urBcY75BtRikup9cc4?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Onward seeks efficient growth, prioritizing ROI over rapid expansion](https://fathom.video/share/ZFNALZ5Lc61sz6urBcY75BtRikup9cc4?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [GrowthX offers AI-assisted content creation with expert review, producing 7-8 articles/week](https://fathom.video/share/ZFNALZ5Lc61sz6urBcY75BtRikup9cc4?tab=summary&timestamp=1077.0)
  - [GrowthX is shifting to a strategy-first approach, proposing a 2-month initial engagement](https://fathom.video/share/ZFNALZ5Lc61sz6urBcY75BtRikup9cc4?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
  - [Pricing discussed: \~$9k/mo for content, $20-30k for 2-month strategy engagement](https://fathom.video/share/ZFNALZ5Lc61sz6urBcY75BtRikup9cc4?tab=summary&timestamp=1071.0)

## Topics

### Onward's Current Marketing Efforts

  - [Bootstrapped company with 10-15 employees](https://fathom.video/share/ZFNALZ5Lc61sz6urBcY75BtRikup9cc4?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
  - [Case studies on website, created with help from content marketer](https://fathom.video/share/ZFNALZ5Lc61sz6urBcY75BtRikup9cc4?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [Blog undeveloped; desire for long-form SEO pillar content](https://fathom.video/share/ZFNALZ5Lc61sz6urBcY75BtRikup9cc4?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
  - [Social media presence minimal](https://fathom.video/share/ZFNALZ5Lc61sz6urBcY75BtRikup9cc4?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
  - [Founder-led marketing on LinkedIn/X (paused, to be resumed)](https://fathom.video/share/ZFNALZ5Lc61sz6urBcY75BtRikup9cc4?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Interest in comparison content (e.g., Onward vs. competitors)](https://fathom.video/share/ZFNALZ5Lc61sz6urBcY75BtRikup9cc4?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)

### GrowthX's Company Background

  - [Founded by Marcel Santilli, experienced in marketing for large tech companies](https://fathom.video/share/ZFNALZ5Lc61sz6urBcY75BtRikup9cc4?tab=summary&timestamp=689.0)
  - [Grew from $3M to $7-8M revenue in past year](https://fathom.video/share/ZFNALZ5Lc61sz6urBcY75BtRikup9cc4?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
  - [Team expanded from 10 to 60-65 employees](https://fathom.video/share/ZFNALZ5Lc61sz6urBcY75BtRikup9cc4?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Leverages AI for research and content creation, with expert review](https://fathom.video/share/ZFNALZ5Lc61sz6urBcY75BtRikup9cc4?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)

### GrowthX's Content Creation Process

  - [Uses AI-assisted workflows for research and content generation](https://fathom.video/share/ZFNALZ5Lc61sz6urBcY75BtRikup9cc4?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)
  - [Content reviewed by 3-5 industry experts](https://fathom.video/share/ZFNALZ5Lc61sz6urBcY75BtRikup9cc4?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
  - [Focus on sustainable organic growth vs. paid advertising](https://fathom.video/share/ZFNALZ5Lc61sz6urBcY75BtRikup9cc4?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
  - [Aims to align with client strategy and deliver measurable results](https://fathom.video/share/ZFNALZ5Lc61sz6urBcY75BtRikup9cc4?tab=summary&timestamp=969.0)

### Proposed Engagement Structure

  - [Shifting from immediate 12-month contracts to 2-month strategy-first approach](https://fathom.video/share/ZFNALZ5Lc61sz6urBcY75BtRikup9cc4?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
  - [Initial engagement: Full assessment, audit, strategy development](https://fathom.video/share/ZFNALZ5Lc61sz6urBcY75BtRikup9cc4?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)
  - [Post-strategy: Option to continue with GrowthX or implement independently](https://fathom.video/share/ZFNALZ5Lc61sz6urBcY75BtRikup9cc4?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)
  - [Typical output: 50,000 words/month, 7-8 articles/week](https://fathom.video/share/ZFNALZ5Lc61sz6urBcY75BtRikup9cc4?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

### Pricing and Commitment

  - [Previous model: $9,000/month for editorial services](https://fathom.video/share/ZFNALZ5Lc61sz6urBcY75BtRikup9cc4?tab=summary&timestamp=1071.0)
  - [New proposed model: $20,000-$30,000 for 2-month strategy engagement](https://fathom.video/share/ZFNALZ5Lc61sz6urBcY75BtRikup9cc4?tab=summary&timestamp=1371.0)
  - [Full year engagement estimated at \~$100,000](https://fathom.video/share/ZFNALZ5Lc61sz6urBcY75BtRikup9cc4?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)

### Client Concerns and Requests

  - [Josh (Onward) prefers shorter assessment period (days vs. months)](https://fathom.video/share/ZFNALZ5Lc61sz6urBcY75BtRikup9cc4?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)
  - [Requested content samples and production during initial period](https://fathom.video/share/ZFNALZ5Lc61sz6urBcY75BtRikup9cc4?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)
  - [Hesitant about long-term commitment without seeing results](https://fathom.video/share/ZFNALZ5Lc61sz6urBcY75BtRikup9cc4?tab=summary&timestamp=1216.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bruno to consult with Marcel on tailored approach for Onward](https://fathom.video/share/ZFNALZ5Lc61sz6urBcY75BtRikup9cc4?tab=summary&timestamp=1361.0)
  - [GrowthX to send deck, pricing details, and content samples to Josh](https://fathom.video/share/ZFNALZ5Lc61sz6urBcY75BtRikup9cc4?tab=summary&timestamp=1402.0)
  - [Explore possibility of including content production in initial engagement](https://fathom.video/share/ZFNALZ5Lc61sz6urBcY75BtRikup9cc4?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide more details on strategy-first approach and potential ROI timeline](https://fathom.video/share/ZFNALZ5Lc61sz6urBcY75BtRikup9cc4?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
